reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención y conocedores de la zona. Nos guiaron por el camino que íbamos a recorrer y no tuvimos inconvenientes en hacerlo de noche.

(Translated by Google)
Very good service and knowledgeable about the area. They guided us along the route we were going to take, and we had no problems doing it at night.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZeUxMRTdnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Es una de las dos estaciones de servicio que hay en la ciudad, se hacen largas colas para cargar combustible. Tiene un YPF Full donde comer y tomar cafe, cuenta con WI-FI. Los baños la mayoria de veces estan reventados. Para cargar agua es caro.

(Translated by Google)
It's one of only two gas stations in town, and there are often long lines to fill up. It has a YPF Full convenience store where you can eat and drink coffee, and it offers Wi-Fi. The restrooms are usually in terrible condition. Water is expensive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZNE9lX3BRRRAB

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. The convenience store needs to offer food available at all times.

reviewReply.comment: Hola, tenes comida las 24 hrs. si no hay hecha hay que esperar pero tenemos. me gustaría saber en que día y horario pasó para rastrear por qué no había comida.
